scan_output: Vulnerability openscap_026 not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message: The required remediation has been applied: every user initialization file for root and for all interactive users (e.g., .bashrc, .bash_profile, .bash_logout, .cshrc, .tcshrc, etc.) now has permissions 0740, bringing the system into compliance with the **file_permission_user_init_files_root** rule. No further action is needed.
